CheckTitle: Check if E2E Networks database clusters do not expose a public IP on the master node
Description: This check verifies that the master node of each E2E Networks database cluster is reachable only over private networking and does not have a public IP address assigned.
Risk: Public database endpoints expand attack surface and increase risk of unauthorized access over the internet.

Recommendation.Text: Remove the public IP from the master node of database clusters and access them through private networking.
